_meta.description: SDXL 720P竖屏图生图 + Wan2.2 图生视频 完整工作流
_meta.pipeline: SDXL文生图(768x1344) → 后处理resize到720x1280 → Wan2.2 I2V 8秒视频

step1_sdxl_t2i.name: SDXL文生图 - 生成720P竖屏分镜图
step1_sdxl_t2i.description: 使用SDXL生成竖屏分镜底图，用于后续Wan2.2图生视频

config.negative_prompt: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, blurry, deformed, ugly, duplicate, morbid, mutilated, out of frame, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, ugly, blurry, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, gross proportions, malformed limbs, missing arms, missing legs, extra arms, extra legs, mutated hands, fused fingers, too many fingers, long neck

node_types.CLIPTextEncode: ComfyUI内置 - 编码正向/反向提示词
node_types.ImageScale: ComfyUI内置 - 缩放图像到目标分辨率(替代ImageResize)
node_types.SaveImage: ComfyUI内置 - 保存图像到文件

step2_wan22_i2v.name: Wan2.2 图生视频 - 720P 8秒
step2_wan22_i2v.description: 使用Wan2.2 I2V模型将分镜图生成为8秒720P竖屏视频

config.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, static, no motion, jitter, flicker

node_types.UNETLoader: ComfyUI内置 - 加载Wan2.2 I2V扩散模型(I2V模型需单独加载UNet，不能用CheckpointLoaderSimple)
node_types.CLIPLoader: ComfyUI内置 - 加载CLIP文本编码器(类型选wan2.1)
node_types.LoadImage: ComfyUI内置 - 加载SDXL生成的分镜图
node_types.ImageScale: ComfyUI内置 - 缩放到Wan2.2输入尺寸832x480(替代ImageResize)
node_types.CLIPTextEncode: ComfyUI内置 - 编码运动提示词和反向提示词
node_types.WanImageToVideo: ComfyUI-Wan2.2自定义 - I2V核心节点，接收model/positive/negative/vae/image输入
node_types.VAEDecode: ComfyUI内置 - VAE解码latent到视频帧

step3_combined.name: SDXL+Wan2.2 组合工作流 - 文字到视频一条龙
step3_combined.description: 将SDXL文生图和Wan2.2 I2V合二为一的完整工作流，只需导入一个工作流即可完成从文字描述到视频的完整流程

node_types.UNETLoader: ComfyUI内置 - 加载Wan2.2 I2V UNet
node_types.CLIPTextEncode: ComfyUI内置 - 编码提示词(SDXL正/反向 + I2V运动/反向)
node_types.KSampler: ComfyUI内置 - K采样器(SDXL用euler_ancestral, I2V用uni_pc_bh2)
node_types.ImageScale: ComfyUI内置 - 缩放图像(1080x1920保存 + 832x480输入I2V)

template_variables.{{POSITIVE_PROMPT}}: SDXL正向提示词，描述分镜画面
template_variables.{{MOTION_PROMPT}}: Wan2.2运动提示词，描述视频中的运动

step4_postprocess.name: 后处理 - FFmpeg合成
step4_postprocess.description: 将各场视频拼接、添加字幕、配音

full_episode_estimate.description: 一集2分钟短剧的完整制作时间和成本估算
